slides.title: Few days? *Full body*
slides.body: Training 3 days? Hit everything each session.

slides.title: More days? *Split it*
slides.body: 4 to 6 days? Upper/lower or push pull legs.

slides.title: Hit muscles *twice*
slides.body: Each muscle twice a week beats once.

slides.title: Match your *recovery*
slides.body: Pick what you can actually recover from.

slides.title: Stay *consistent*
slides.body: The best split is the one you'll actually do.

slides.title: Train your *way*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your training and recovery in one score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
